page_content:
Prerequisite: Must have satisfied Fundamental Studies Academic Writing requirement.

ENGL292 Writing for Change (3 Credits)

Service learning in collaboration with students at area high schools. Explores how writing can be a tool for social change. Participants serve as mentors, create a performance event concerning a pressing social issue, and compose reflections, literacy narratives, publicity materials, and a multimodal project. Focus on developing critical self-awareness. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-English department. Recommended: ENGL101.

Jointly offered with: ENGL388C.

Restriction: Requires application and references.

Credit Only Granted for. ENGL292 or ENGL388C.
